channel.title: CyberNetSec - Cloud Security
channel.description: Latest cloud security threat intelligence - the last 10 articles

item.title: HealthNet Insurance Breach Exposes Sensitive Health Data of 11 Million Patients via Misconfigured AWS S3 Bucket
item.description:
HealthNet Insurance, a major US health provider, has disclosed a data breach that exposed the personal and medical information of 11 million individuals. The breach, discovered on June 15, 2026, originated from a misconfigured Amazon Web Services (AWS) S3 bucket that contained access keys to other s...

Severity: High

Categories: Data Breach, Cloud Security, Regulatory

Read Full Article →

item.title: DataHaven Cloud Storage Outage Caused by Security Breach Targeting Customer Data
item.description:
Enterprise cloud storage provider DataHaven has confirmed that a multi-hour global outage on June 30, 2026, was the result of a security breach. Attackers gained access to an internal Kubernetes cluster via a zero-day vulnerability in a proprietary management API. They then attempted to issue comman...

Severity: High

Categories: Cloud Security, Cyberattack, Incident Response

Read Full Article →

item.title: Accenture and ServiceNow Unveil Joint AI Offering to Modernize Enterprise Risk Management
item.description:
Accenture and ServiceNow have launched a joint offering that combines AI-powered managed security services with an automated migration solution. The platform aims to help organizations move from legacy risk systems to a modern, unified platform, enabling them to combat the rising speed and sophistic...

Severity: Informational

Categories: Security Operations, Policy and Compliance, Cloud Security

Read Full Article →

item.title: Fortinet Launches FortiSOC, an AI-Powered Unified Security Operations Platform
item.description:
Fortinet has launched FortiSOC, a new, cloud-delivered Security Operations Center (SOC) platform designed to unify six key security functions into a single SaaS offering. The platform leverages 'agentic AI' to help security teams automate investigations, correlate alerts across assets and identities...

Severity: Informational

Categories: Security Operations, Cloud Security, Threat Intelligence

Read Full Article →

item.title: New 'Icarus' Extortion Group Hits Klue, Steals Customer Salesforce Data via OAuth Attack
item.description:
The competitive intelligence platform Klue has confirmed a security breach where attackers gained unauthorized access to its customers' connected Salesforce environments. A new extortion group named 'Icarus' has claimed responsibility. The attack vector involved the theft and abuse of OAuth tokens, ...

Severity: High

Categories: Data Breach, Threat Actor, Cloud Security

Read Full Article →

item.title: New 'Agentjacking' Attack Turns AI Coding Assistants into Malicious Insiders
item.description:
Researchers have detailed a novel attack vector called 'Agentjacking,' which allows threat actors to hijack AI coding assistants and execute arbitrary code on a developer's machine. The attack exploits the trust AI agents place in diagnostic platforms like Sentry. By finding a public Sentry DSN, an ...

Severity: High

Categories: Cyberattack, Cloud Security, Threat Intelligence

Read Full Article →

item.title: Critical 'DifyTap' Flaws in Dify AI Platform Expose Cross-Tenant Data in 1M+ Apps
item.description:
Four vulnerabilities, dubbed 'DifyTap,' have been discovered in the popular open-source AI application platform Dify. Two of the flaws are critical (CVE-2026-41947, CVE-2026-41948) and could allow attackers to break tenant isolation, enabling them to read private AI conversations, access documents f...

Severity: Critical

Categories: Vulnerability, Cloud Security, Data Breach

Read Full Article →

item.title: Snyk Unveils Evo ADS to Secure AI-Powered Coding Agents
item.description:
Cybersecurity firm Snyk has launched Evo Agentic Development Security (ADS), a new platform designed to govern and secure the actions of autonomous AI coding agents. As developers increasingly use AI agents that can build software with minimal human oversight, Snyk's tool aims to address the novel s...

Severity: Informational

Categories: Cloud Security, Security Operations, Supply Chain Attack

Read Full Article →

item.title: EU Proposes 'Tech Sovereignty Package' to Boost Independence in Cloud, AI, and Chips
item.description:
The European Commission has unveiled the 'Tech Sovereignty Package,' a major policy initiative aimed at bolstering the EU's digital independence. Introduced on June 3, 2026, the package includes four pillars, most notably the Cloud and AI Development Act (CADA) and Chips Act 2.0. The plan seeks to r...

Severity: Informational

Categories: Policy and Compliance, Regulatory, Cloud Security

Read Full Article →

item.title: New Cloud Attack Vector: Universal Bucket Hijacking Technique Exposes Major CSPs to Data Exfiltration
item.description:
Palo Alto Networks' Unit 42 has discovered a novel and widespread bucket hijacking technique that poses a significant data exfiltration risk to customers of major cloud service providers (CSPs) like Amazon Web Services, Google Cloud, and Microsoft Azure. The attack leverages the globally unique nami...

Severity: High

Categories: Vulnerability, Cloud Security, Threat Intelligence

Read Full Article →
